en.section_title: Effective design comes from deep understanding.
en.section_text: Design is part of everything we make. Every choice, what to include and what to leave out, shapes how people use and understand a system. The best work comes from seeing those choices clearly and making them with intent.
en.expertise_intro: We cover the full scope of design, from diagnosing issues to designing scalable systems. Each one is a focused way to bring clarity and structure to complex products.
en.values_intro: Our roots are in open source and hacker spaces, where people think carefully about how technology is made and who depends on it. That background shaped the principles that guide us.

en.title: Uncover friction
en.description: We study how the product behaves in practice; what’s smooth, what’s fragile, and where people get stuck. This reveals how issues connect, so design decisions address causes, not symptoms.

en.title: Work within the team
en.description: We work within the teams we support, joining key discussions to understand how decisions are made. This keeps design aligned with real technical and organizational conditions.

en.title: Strengthen the system
en.description: We turn what we learn into design changes that reach beyond individual screens. By linking small improvements, we help teams build systems that are clearer, more consistent, and easier to maintain.

en.heading: Ready to build your page?
en.subtext: Compose, preview, and publish — no developer required.

en.heading: Compose pages from reusable blocks
en.subheading: A bilingual, block-based landing page assembled entirely in Directus.

en.caption: A full-width image block with an optional caption.

en.quote: Good design is as little design as possible — but no less than the work demands.

en.body:
Rich text block

Editors write long-form content here with full formatting — bold, italics, lists and links.

en.heading: Text beside media
en.body: A flexible two-column layout pairs a headline and copy with an image. The media side is configurable.

en.title: Visual Identity Refresh for Reset Tech
en.excerpt: We refreshed Reset Tech’s visual identity through workshops, clear guidelines, and new illustrations for digital, print, and dataviz. The result is a progressive identity that connects with diverse audiences.
en.description: We refreshed Reset Tech’s visual identity through workshops, clear guidelines, and new illustrations for digital, print, and dataviz. The result is a progressive identity that connects with diverse audiences.

en.title: Dynamic illustration system for OONI
en.excerpt: We created a modular illustration system for OONI making it easy for both designers and non-designers to craft their own illustrations, bringing the OONIverse to life.
en.description: We created a modular illustration system for OONI making it easy for both designers and non-designers to craft their own illustrations, bringing the OONIverse to life.

en.title: Untangling Complexity for QubesOS
en.excerpt: We focused on improving critical aspects of the user experience: accessibility, visual consistency, clear communication, and intuitive interface design.
en.description: We focused on improving critical aspects of the user experience: accessibility, visual consistency, clear communication, and intuitive interface design.

en.title: Mailvelope UX & UI Improvements
en.excerpt: We made it easier to set up Mailvelope in Nextcloud Mail and send encrypted emails.
en.description: We made it easier to set up Mailvelope in Nextcloud Mail and send encrypted emails.

en.title: Tumpa - Desktop App & Landing page
en.excerpt: We transformed Tumpa’s identity and interface, ensuring intuitive interactions and clear pathways for OpenPGP key management.
en.description: We transformed Tumpa’s identity and interface, ensuring intuitive interactions and clear pathways for OpenPGP key management.

en.title: Open Technology Fund - Website Illustrations
en.excerpt: We created a fresh visual style, offering a series of illustrations for the OTF’s new website. These visuals highlight the importance of open technology and, most importantly, the community. They enhance OTF’s website, providing a visually engaging user experience.
en.description: We created a fresh visual style, offering a series of illustrations for the OTF’s new website. These visuals highlight the importance of open technology and, most importantly, the community. They enhance OTF’s website, providing a visually engaging user experience.

en.title: Rebranding and User Research for Rallly
Responsibility
en.description: We work with teams who build technology that respects people.
en.subtitle: Privacy, transparency, and public good are not extras, they are the foundation

en.title: Understanding
en.description: We take time to understand teams, users, and constraints.
en.subtitle: That understanding leads to better decisions and longer lasting results.

en.title: Intention
en.description: We don’t chase trends or features for their own sake.
en.subtitle: We focus on decisions that genuinely improve the product and strengthen the system.

en.title: Collaboration
en.description: We integrate with teams as partners, not clients.
en.subtitle: Our role is to listen closely, ask the right questions, and co-create solutions that work.

en.newsletter_title: Get occasional updates on what we’re thinking and working on.

en.tagline: We bring clarity and coherence to complex systems

en.title: Playground
en.seo_description: A demo of every page builder block.

en.title: Brand Strategy
en.description: Define the product’s positioning, values, and narrative for consistent communication.

en.title: Product Strategy
en.description: Define product goals, priorities, and success criteria to guide design direction.

en.title: Design Audit
en.description: Systematic review of current product UX/UI, accessibility, and overall usability.

en.title: Stakeholder & User Research
en.description: Research that combines team and user perspectives to uncover real needs, constraints, and points of friction.

en.title: Collaborative workshops
en.description: Align teams on brand direction, tone, and audience needs through structured sessions.

en.title: Product Architecture
en.description: Map user journeys, workflows, and structural relationships that shape the overall experience.

en.title: Rapid user testing
en.description: Validate where the design breaks down in real-world scenarios.

en.title: Visual identity design
en.description: Explore and refine logos, color, and typography to create a distinctive visual language.

en.title: UX/UI Design & Prototyping
en.description: Create and test key screens and interactions to validate structure and usability early.

en.title: Brand guidelines
en.description: Document principles, assets, and usage rules for consistent application across contexts.

en.title: Design System
en.description: Formalize components, styles, and accessibility standards to ensure scalable, consistent design.

en.title: Security UX Review
en.description: Evaluate how privacy and security perform from a user’s perspective; identifying design barriers that affect trust, adoption, or safety.

en.title: Design recommendations
en.description: Turn evidence into actionable guidance for improving usability and structure.

en.title: Design system
en.description: Extend brand elements into reusable components that bridge identity and interface.

en.text: A cohesive design system adaptable across all brand surfaces
A coherent design architecture that defines structure, interaction, and behavior
Evidence of where friction occurs and why
Clear, practical brand guidelines for consistent application
A unified design system for consistent, scalable implementation
Research-backed insights to guide product decisions
A unified visual language that reflects how the team understands the brand
Prototypes that validate usability and system logic
Implementation-ready assets that scale across products and platforms
Documentation and assets to support smooth implementation
A prioritized roadmap for next steps

en.title: Define the Strategy
en.description: We translate audit findings into a clear design direction; aligning on priorities, success criteria, and what “better” looks like for users and teams.

en.title: Audit the System
en.description: We begin with a structured review of how the product performs; measuring usability, accessibility, and design consistency. This gives us a factual baseline before adding human insight.

en.title: Align the Vision
en.description: We clarify how the product should communicate — its positioning, values, and narrative. Through collaborative workshops, we align teams on voice, direction, and audience needs, creating a foundation for coherent expression.

en.title: Shape the Identity
en.description: We experiment with how the brand could look and feel; translating strategy into concepts for logos, color, and typography. This stage is about testing possibilities and refining what best captures the product’s character.

en.title: Deepen the Research
en.description: Next, we look beyond the interface to understand how people use and maintain the system. Through user and stakeholder research, we uncover the decisions, needs, and constraints shaping its current form.
en.tags: Contextual interviews, Rapid user testing, User research

en.title: Shape the Experience
en.description: We design the architecture that supports that strategy, defining journeys, workflows, and key interactions. Early prototypes help test ideas quickly and refine structure before full design.

en.title: Refine the System
en.description: We formalize design decisions into reusable patterns and systems; components, styles, and accessibility standards that keep design scalable and consistent.

en.title: Define the Direction
en.description: We synthesize everything we’ve learned into clear, actionable priorities; connecting evidence with context. The outcome is a practical roadmap that shows where design improvements will have the greatest impact.

en.title: Codify the Brand
en.description: We formalize design decisions into clear, reusable standards; documenting how visual elements should be applied across products and platforms. This turns the brand into a living system that stays coherent as it scales

en.title: Forensic Audit
en.subtitle: Audit & Diagnose
en.description: Reveal weaknesses in system design and highlight paths for improvement.
en.long_description: A detailed diagnostic of usability, accessibility, and UX performance.
en.section_heading: Understand what works and what doesn’t
en.section_subheading: The Forensic Audit is a diagnostic review of a product’s design; combining user research, accessibility testing, and heuristic analysis to identify weaknesses and opportunities for improvement.

en.title: System Blueprint
en.subtitle: Design & Strategy
en.description: Design clear, scalable products that are intuitive to use and easy to maintain.
en.long_description: Full system design that shapes how the product works, looks, and feels.
en.section_subheading: System Blueprint is a full design process; from product strategy to interaction and interface design. We map flows, define architecture, and prototype solutions that align usability with technical realities.

en.title: Brand Alignment
en.subtitle: Visual Identity
en.description: Define a visual language that conveys purpose and sparks recognition.
en.long_description: A visual identity that reflects what a brand stands for, clearly and consistently.
en.section_subheading: Brand Alignment bridges internal understanding and outward expression. We translate values, tone, and purpose into a cohesive visual identity that stays consistent across all platforms and products.

en.bio:
Founder and design strategist with over 12 years of experience leading open source design initiatives at Ubuntu, Mozilla, Tor, and Wikimedia. 
elio[at]ura.design

Design strategist leading usability and research coordination across complex, high-risk tools. Focuses on clarity and alignment across the whole process, including the UX writing and content structure that shape how people understand a system.
christopher[at]ura.design

Visual designer specializing in visual storytelling and identity design. Dedicated to creating visual coherence across complex ecosystems; has developed over 120 visual identity systems.
ergi[at]ura.design

UX researcher focused on accessibility, usability, and user testing across open source and research-driven tools. Advocates for inclusive design methods that make complex systems understandable and equitable.
anja[at]ura.design

Design strategist and researcher combining academic rigor with practical UX work. Author of peer-reviewed research on user-centred privacy and emerging design practices.
angie[at]ura.design

Systems engineer focused on secure, scalable infrastructure for open-source and research teams. Joined Ura in its first year and continues to shape our technical foundation.
anxhelo[at]ura.design

en.quote: Working with Ura was incredible! Their team jumped in on short notice to create thoughtful, beautifully designed social media assets that perfectly captured our report’s message and branding.

Ura Design improved our visibility, boosted our reputation and confidence.
I like the fact that we can work asynchronously and we do not need to have many videocalls, which break our flow.

Working with Ura was a truly professional experience rooted in purpose and social impact. Their team brought honesty, collaboration, and a strong sense of community value to the project, leaving a big positive impact on our work. Ura Design is a genuine example of what it means to combine professionalism with heart.

Ura's team was ready to support us anytime we had questions about existing designs or the illustration system they've built for us, and even as external contractors, they have been an irreplaceable part of our team for a while. Huge kudos to the team!
